name: risk-exposure-generative-ui-copilot
description: The Generative UI spectrum on Azure: three demos (controlled, declarative, open-ended) with Microsoft Foundry, Databricks Genie, CopilotKit and AG-UI.

scripts.build: npm run build:controlled-web && npm run build:declarative-web && npm run build:open-ended-web
scripts.install:controlled-agent: python3.12 -m venv apps/controlled/agent/.venv && apps/controlled/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && apps/controlled/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e 'apps/controlled/agent[dev]'
scripts.install:declarative-agent: python3.12 -m venv apps/declarative/agent/.venv && apps/declarative/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && apps/declarative/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e 'apps/declarative/agent[dev]'
scripts.install:open-ended-agent: python3.12 -m venv apps/open-ended/agent/.venv && apps/open-ended/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && apps/open-ended/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e 'apps/open-ended/agent[dev]'
scripts.validate:controlled-web: npm run lint:controlled-web && npm run test:controlled-web && npm run build:controlled-web
scripts.validate:declarative-web: npm run lint:declarative-web && npm run test:declarative-web && npm run build:declarative-web
scripts.validate:open-ended-web: npm run lint:open-ended-web && npm run test:open-ended-web && npm run build:open-ended-web
scripts.validate: npm run validate:controlled-agent && npm run validate:declarative-agent && npm run validate:open-ended-agent && npm run validate:controlled-web && npm run validate:declarative-web && npm run validate:open-ended-web
